summary: Cross-Filtering Feature Testing Complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. The feature allows users to click on bar/pie chart data points to filter other widgets on the dashboard.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' appears during page transitions. This is a Recharts rendering timing issue but does not affect functionality.

backend_api: PASS: GET /api/dashboards/{id}/widgets - Returns 3 widgets for test dashboard
PASS: GET /api/widgets/{id}/data - Returns unfiltered widget data
PASS: POST /api/widgets/{id}/data with empty filters - Returns data with filtered=false
PASS: POST /api/widgets/{id}/data with Region filter - Returns filtered data with filtered=true
PASS: POST /api/widgets/{id}/data with multiple filters - Supports multiple filter fields
PASS: Dataset has required columns (Region, Sales, Quarter) for cross-filtering
frontend_cross_filter: PASS: Dashboard loads with 3 widgets (Bar chart 'Sales by Region', Pie chart 'Sales by Quarter', Stat card 'Total Sales')
PASS: Clicking bar chart bar triggers cross-filter (Region: Central)
PASS: Clicking pie chart slice triggers cross-filter (Quarter: Q1)
PASS: Active Filters Bar appears at top with correct styling (violet theme)
PASS: Filter chips show field:value format (e.g., 'Region: Central')
PASS: Filter chips have X icon for removal
PASS: Clicking filter chip removes that specific filter
PASS: Clear all button removes all active filters
PASS: Filtered badge appears on non-source widgets when filter is active
PASS: Toast notification shows when filter is applied
PASS: Other widgets refresh with filtered data (bar chart Y-axis scale changes)
PASS: data-testid attributes present: active-filters-bar, filter-chip-{field}, clear-all-filters-btn, dashboard-builder-page

seed_data_created: None (used existing test dashboard created by main agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cross-filtering feature fully implemented and working. Test dashboard ID: e5f3240e-a009-4df5-9124-be7c7c960944 has 3 widgets using Sales Data 2026 dataset (Region, Sales, Quarter columns). Cross-filter flow: click chart element -> setFilter called -> ActiveFiltersBar shows filter chip -> POST /widgets/{id}/data with filters -> other widgets refresh with filtered data -> 'Filtered' badge shown.

frontend.context: DashboardFilterContext.jsx - provides filters state, setFilter, removeFilter, clearAllFilters

components.ActiveFiltersBar: Shows filter chips with field:value format and Clear all button
components.DashboardWidget: Has onClick handler for charts, shows Filtered badge when isFiltered=true
